title: Hacaroa 50 Pack 5-Compartment Bagasse Plates, Natural School Lunch Trays, Rectangular for Party, Picnic, Eco-Friendly, Biodegradable, White
features: Hacaroa 50 pack 5-compartment paper plates, measure 11 x 8.7 x 1.5 inches/28 x 22 x 3.8 cm, allowing you to enjoy your meal safely with enough room and no spill.
Our compartment paper plates are made of sugarcane fiber, eco-friendly, sustainable, renewable and biodegradable. It's tree-free and plastic-free.

5 Compartments: Hacaroa 50 pack natural bagasse plates with 5 sections provide enough space for your entire meal in 1 plate, easily portion kid's food and great for quick meals and picky eaters in keeping food separate.
Easy to Clean & Stack: The lunch trays will degrade quickly, convenient cleanup for you, your customers, and the planet. Besides, they can be stacked to save space when not in use.

Our biodegradable white dinner plates can be used for hot or cold food items, perfect for food trucks, restaurants, school dining hall, family gathering, camping, picnics, lunches, catering, BBQs, events, parties, weddings, etc.
description: Product Description Hacaroa 50 Pack 5-Compartment Paper Plates, Natural Bagasse Plates School Lunch Trays, Rectangular The rectangular divided plates are easy cleanup. Also, they are easy to stack to save space when not in use. Those bagasse plates are ideal for hot and cold food, help you create a healthy diet. 50 Pack 5-Compartment Sugarcrane Plates, Rectangular Divided Plates, White Size: 11 x 8.7 x 1.5 inches/28 x 22 x 3.8 cm, deep enough and no spill. Material: Natural bagasse plates Package Includes: 50 pack paper plates Made of Natural Sugarcrane Fiber, Convenient Cleanup for the Planet! 5 Compartments Those school lunch trays with 5 sections have enough space for various foods, perfect for kids, picky eaters, quick meals, etc. Natural Bagasse Hacaroa 50 pack 5-compartment paper plates are made of natural bagasse, tree-free, plastic-free. Convenient to Use The bagasse plates are refrigerator safe, oven safe, microwave safe, super convenient to use.
